applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)

applicable_clauses.text: 同一发票最多报销1次。发现同一发票在不同报销单中重复出现的,应认定为重复报销风险。
applicable_clauses.applicability_reason: Defines duplicate reimbursement: same invoice appearing in multiple claims

applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Business event date 2025-05-05 falls within effective period (2025-01-01 onward)

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Repealed by 2025 revision effective 2025-01-01; business event date 2025-05-05 is after repeal
